detail: Two skeletons destroyed. Maren's Channel Divinity drove one to pieces; Sable finished the second. Nothing unusual — old reflexes, no real hunger.
Two ghouls and a skeleton fled south into r03 mid-combat, broken by Sable's Turn the Unholy. They are still frightened. Ghoul_1 destroyed by Maren. Conditions carry forward.
Burial corridor cleared. Party's divine channelling is spent. Sable has no spell slots. The fled undead are somewhere ahead.

All three frightened undead fled through south arch into r04 in the first round — they never threatened the party. Fear conditions still active, roughly 3-5 rounds remaining when the party reaches r04.

Specter fled through south WALL into r04 at 13/33 HP after two failed Life Drain attempts. It is wounded but not desperate — it has had time to settle. It knows the party has strong divine fire. It will not come straight at Maren again.

Offering vault cleared. Specter and all undead gone — destroyed or fled into r04. Party: Maren 15/22 HP (Spiritual Weapon still active, ~7 rounds), Sable 18/21 HP, all channel uses spent, Sable has no spell slots.
